description: A marketing operations analyst needs a sales pipeline report. Using the data file sales_data.csv located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv, build a two-page Power BI report. The report must include two DAX measures: Avg_Order_Value (Average of Sales_Amount) and Total_Transactions (Count of rows). Page 1 must be named "Pipeline Summary" and contain a Funnel chart showing Sales_Amount by Product_Category and a Stacked Bar Chart showing Sales_Amount by Customer_Type with Payment_Method as the legend. Page 2 must be named "Category Drillthrough", configured as a drill-through page for the Product_Category field, and include a Card visual for the Avg_Order_Value measure and a Table visual displaying Sale_Date, Sales_Rep, Region, Sales_Amount, Quantity_Sold, and Discount. Save the final report to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Sales_Funnel_Report.pbix.
